summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of EduFlow Expo React Native app. Fixed critical duplicate screen name bug in _layout.tsx. All major flows tested: login (3 roles), dashboard, attendance, marks, wallet, food court, notifications, settings, users (admin), logout. MOCKED API - entire API layer uses axios-mock-adapter with JSON seeds.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED: Duplicate 'role-switch' screen registration causing 'Screen names must be unique' error
Sign Out button click doesn't immediately redirect to /login - stays on current page

integration_issues.issue: Top-up button click doesn't visibly update balance in UI (may need page refresh)
Cart bar with 'Place order' button not visible after adding item to cart in test

issues: Layout children must be of type Screen warnings (expo-router 5.x)
Missing route files for HOD tabs: department, exams, performance
Missing route files for Admin tabs: departments, finance, analytics

action_items: Create missing route files for HOD: department.tsx, exams.tsx, performance.tsx
Create missing route files for Admin: departments.tsx, finance.tsx, analytics.tsx
Fix logout redirect - should navigate to /login after Sign Out
Verify wallet top-up updates balance in real-time
Verify food court cart bar appears after adding items
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Duplicate Tabs.Screen for 'role-switch' in _layout.tsx caused app crash after login
routeConfig.ts defines routes that don't have corresponding files in app/(tabs)/ directory
Console warnings about Layout children should be addressed for cleaner logs
seed_data_creation: None - using existing mock JSON data
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is frontend-only with axios-mock-adapter. Fixed duplicate screen bug. Login works for all 3 roles. Dashboard, Attendance, Marks, Wallet, Food Court, Notifications, Settings, Users screens all load correctly. Logout redirect may need attention. Missing route files for some HOD/Admin tabs cause console warnings but don't break functionality.
tests_passed: Login screen renders two-panel layout (dark hero + form)
Demo quick-fill buttons visible (Organization Admin, Head of Department, Student)
Invalid credentials show inline error 'No account found for this email'
Student login → Dashboard with 4 metric cards (Attendance, GPA, Wallet, Reward points)
Student bottom tabs: Dashboard, Profile, Notifications, Settings, Attendance, Marks, Food Court, Wallet
Attendance tab shows overall % + 5 subjects for student
Marks tab shows GPA metric + 5 exam entries
Notifications tab shows list with mark-all-read button
Wallet tab shows balance, transactions, quick top-up buttons
Food Court tab shows menu with categories and Add to cart buttons
HOD login → Dashboard with Department overview (Students, Faculty, Avg attendance, Upcoming exams)
Admin login → Dashboard with Organisation overview (Total students, Faculty, Monthly revenue, Pending fees)
Admin Users tab shows searchable list with Add button
Settings screen shows user info, preferences, Sign Out button
tests_failed: Logout redirect to /login (stays on current page)
Wallet top-up balance update not verified
Food court cart bar visibility after adding item not verified
mocked_api_note: ENTIRE API LAYER IS MOCKED via axios-mock-adapter + JSON seeds. This is by design (frontend-only preview). No backend exists.
